strategy: Hit with Fire (+15%); he resists Ice 50%.
He opens with Frozen Armor. Break the Absorb with Shatter or pierce before your real hit.

He runs a fixed cycle, stacking Iceblades on himself (two per cycle after the first) and an Amplify Aura, then hitting with Hailstorm, Blizzard, Woolly Mammoth (600-700), or Judgement (125). Shield Ice and heal through the big hits.
His pet heals him with Availing Hands, so pressure him faster than he and the pet can recover, and consider an infection to cut the heal.
Set up blades behind the broken Absorb and finish with one Fire hit before his Iceblades and Tower Shield stack up.
cheatNotes: On Round 1 he shields himself with a Frozen Armor Absorb. Shatter or pierce it.
Cycle: he Iceblades himself, two per cycle after the first loop.
Cycle: he casts Blizzard. Shield Ice.
Cycle: he casts Amplify to boost his damage.
Cycle: he casts Woolly Mammoth (600-700) if he has the pips, else passes.
Cycle: his pet casts Availing Hands (85+870 heal) and he casts Balanceblade.
The cycle then repeats, giving him two Iceblades each loop.
